name: Turkey Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chopped fresh thyme, OR 1 teaspoon Dried thyme
1 1/2 pound Ground turkey (2 parts dark meat to 1 part white meat)
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: For this sausage, the turkey should be 2 parts dark meat to 1 part white meat. Ground turkey from the supermarket works well in this recipe.
1. Combine brandy, thyme, cloves, onion, pepper, and salt in a small saucepan.
2. Place over medium heat and cook for 3 minutes.
3. Scrape mixture into the bowl of a food processor.
4. Add bacon to the food processor and puree until smooth.
5. Transfer the purée to a mixing bowl.
6. Add ground turkey and egg whites, then mix well.
7. Stuff the mixture into casings or form into patties.
8. Grill or cook sausages and serve immediately.
